fullArticle:
Trout homers in return from IL, Adell hits 2 HRs as Angels beat Rangers 13-1

Jo Adell has played 7 seasons for the Angels. He has a .226 batting average, 422 hits, 88 home runs, 278 RBIs and 214 runs scored.
